text:
**Concrete replacement:** **DELETE** the `codename` field (293) and its computation (290), emitting `{"session_id": canonical}` only. The caller (opencode plugin) parses `session_id` for adoption; the `codename` was display-only per the comment.
 [...] - `src/idref.rs:46-55` `session_label` — `"codename (agent@host)"`, consumed by `format_envelope` (`src/cli/messaging.rs:235`). **[USER-FACING]** Replace with `agent_label`/instance `display_slug` only (drop the codename prefix).
 [...] Assistant: Now `runtime.rs` `slog` filename — use the raw session_id instead of a codename:
 [...] - **Display/TUI/tail/debug** (agent) ✅ — codename tags → short raw-id prefix or agent label [...] - **session_start / hooks responses + logs** (me) ✅ — `codename` field & log dropped
- **slog filename** (me) ✅ — raw `session_id`
- **tmux resume** (me) ✅ — `resume_by_codename` deleted; raw-id exact+prefix only [...] - `session_label` no longer renders `codename (agent@host)` — it returns the agent-instance label `agent@host` (degrading to the raw `session_id` only when slug is empty). This is what `format_envelope` consumes, so the envelope "From" line is now codename-free automatically.
- Deleted `token_is_codename`; dropped the `looks_like_codename`/`session_codename` imports (now only `slugify_host`). [...] - Codename display gone from TUI/tail/debug (→ raw-id prefix or agent label); `codename` dropped from session_start/hook responses and logs; `resume_by_codename` deleted (raw-id exact+prefix only); slog filename → raw id; README + daemon-rpc-surface + tail-v2-design updated.
